summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Epicenter Hi-Fi music player. All core features working correctly including IndexedDB persistence, navigation, and UI components.
passed_tests: Mi Música shows loading state and empty state message 'No tienes música aún'
Agregar Música button present and clickable
Fixed bottom navigation with all 4 tabs (Ahora, Mi Música, EQ, DSP)
Tab navigation works correctly for all views
EQ view with equalizer controls and reset button
DSP view with all 5 controls (SWEEP, WIDTH, INTENSITY, BALANCE, VOLUME)
Queue toggle functionality in player view
Responsive UI with proper dark theme styling
Navigation remains fixed at bottom during scroll
